sprint.name: Flagship Sprint
sprint.goal: Stand up the standalone product business (store live, email list, reusable production pipeline) and build + launch the flagship course once the syllabus lands. 30-day sprint.

tasks.title: Deploy /learn/ store separation
tasks.detail: Track A1. git push web/ so the standalone store /learn/ goes live. Verify store renders, Payhip button works, zero Preply CTAs, assets 200, no mobile horizontal scroll. index.html stays teaching-only.

tasks.title: Email list: $0 opt-in + welcome email
tasks.detail: Track A2 (#1 compounding asset). Payhip $0 product for survival-phrases.pdf (captures email + delivers + unifies list). Swap free-PDF href + Starter Pack notify CTA in learn/index.html to the $0 URL. Welcome email introduces the ladder, soft-pitches the Kit.

tasks.title: Reusable product production pipeline + content schema
tasks.detail: Track A5, highest-leverage parallel build. Generalize the Kit's one-off tooling into a parametrized pipeline driven by one content JSON: workbook generator (dark+light PDFs), edge-tts audio batch (3 speeds + category tracks, TTS only), gallery/thumbnail generator, reusable Payhip listing + buy-section HTML component. Deliverable: documented content-schema so syllabus output plugs straight in. Fable5 handoff owner.

tasks.title: Analytics: GoatCounter on both pages
tasks.detail: Track A3 (carryover S01 T12). Add free privacy-friendly GoatCounter to index.html + learn/index.html. Track store visits, free-PDF opt-ins, Payhip button clicks. Makes the funnel measurable.

tasks.title: Store polish: SEO, OG, favicon, a11y, mobile
tasks.detail: Track A4. learn/index.html: SEO title/meta, Open Graph + Twitter share image so pins/links preview well, favicon, accessibility pass, mobile QA. Make the store shareable and findable.

tasks.title: Bundle scaffolding + checkout cross-sell
tasks.detail: Track A6. Wire the bundle mechanism + Payhip cross-sell / order-bump so Kit buyers see the next rung. Plumbing ships now; the real bundle product waits on Starter Pack / flagship (T09/T10).

tasks.title: Demand repointing to /learn/
tasks.detail: Track A7. Repoint product-promoting content CTAs (Pinterest / Reddit / Shorts) to /learn/; keep the Preply teaching funnel on autopilot. Never steer Preply students off-platform; do steer the content audience to the products.

tasks.title: Approve Starter Pack + flagship syllabus
tasks.detail: The gate for Track B. Rafael is brainstorming the syllabus in a dedicated chat (kickoff prompt in Syllabus Brainstorm Prompt.md). Locks each module: title, one-line transformation, 3-6 subtopics, key phrases/structures, mapped to the 3-layer method (L1 Survival, L2 Eu self-expression, L3 fluency via pattern expansion). Arrives as content JSON per the T03 schema.

tasks.title: Starter Pack content build ($49.99)
tasks.detail: Track B (carryover S01 T10). Bridge from surviving a conversation to building your own sentences (L2, anchored on Eu). Assemble via the T03 pipeline once the syllabus lands. Blocked on syllabus + pipeline.

tasks.title: Flagship course content build ($97-197)
tasks.detail: Track B. The full method end to end, L1 -> L2 -> L3: the product that replaces taking lessons with Rafael. Workbook PDFs + audio (TTS), optional short video/slides. Built through the T03 pipeline. Blocked on syllabus + pipeline.

tasks.title: Publish store: real buy sections + bundle
tasks.detail: Track B. Replace the store's coming-soon rung + teaser with real Starter Pack and flagship buy sections; publish the real bundle via the T06 plumbing. Blocked until the products exist.

tasks.title: Pinterest poster: Trial -> Standard upgrade
tasks.detail: Carryover S01 T14. Poster pipeline proven end-to-end (OAuth write scopes granted, tokens saved). PARKED: Trial tier cannot create pins in production (403 code 29). Needs a Standard-access application with a demo video (OAuth flow + API call). Waiting on Pinterest, not on us. Manual posting continues meanwhile.

tasks.title: Activate favorite-capture trigger
tasks.detail: Carryover S01 T17. Preply killed favorite notification emails (push-only), breaking the Gmail fast-responder. Rebuild BUILT (MacroDroid -> Apps Script -> Google Sheet -> n8n Sheets Trigger -> template + Telegram draft + 72h follow-up), files in C:\n8n\Preply. Waiting on Rafael: install MacroDroid, deploy Apps Script, import workflow.

tasks.title: Fix live Kit listing + covers wording
tasks.detail: Handoff open item. Live Payhip listing text + PDF covers still say 'spoken by a Brazilian'; audio is TTS, so no human-voice claim. Only Rafael can edit the live listing; re-rendering the covers is a separate render task.

tasks.title: Resolve open product decisions
tasks.detail: Handoff section 5, do not guess. (1) Flagship format: Payhip PDF+audio bundle now vs hosted membership later (recommend bundle first). (2) Email provider: Payhip $0 product vs MailerLite free. (3) Own domain: stay on GitHub Pages subpath vs dedicated domain.

log.what: Sprint S01 closed (Shipping Sprint 01, 2026-07-08 -> 2026-07-12): Survival Kit live for sale, store separation built, funnel groundwork laid. Archived to sprint-S01.json.

Sprint S02 'Flagship Sprint' opened, 30-day (2026-07-12 -> 2026-08-11). Scope reframed to the standalone product business + flagship course per the Fable5 Product Build Handoff. Track A ship-now (T01-T07) plus syllabus gate T08 and Track B flagship build (T09-T11) blocked on it. Carried over analytics (T04), Pinterest poster (T12), favorite-capture (T13).
